2606.30627.title: Pessimism's Paradox: Conservative Offline Training Amplifies Reward Hacking During Online Adaptation in Reasoning Models
2606.30627.paper_summary: Conservative offline training is widely advocated as a safe foundation for subsequent online adaptation: if a policy stays close to well-supported behaviour, the argument goes, it is less likely to exploit imperfections in a learned reward model. We challenge this intuition empirically and mechanistically. We train a Qwen3-14B policy under Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) with three levels of conservatism ($β\in \{β_{\mathrm{lo}}, β_{\mathrm{mid}}, β_{\mathrm{hi}}\}$ derived from empirical log-ratio percentiles), then adapt each checkpoint online against a learned reward ensemble (3\,$\times$\,Qwen3-1.7B) while measuring true performance on GSM8K exact-answer accuracy. We find that \emph{higher offline conservatism monotonically increases reward-hacking damage}, measured by the Goodhart gap and its area under the curve (AUGC), with Spearman $ρ= 1.0$ across all three conditions. Mechanistic analysis reveals a three-link causal chain: (i) high-$β$ DPO compresses policy entropy, (ii) Low-entropy policies generate responses with reduced diversity, concentrating in a narrow region of the reward model's training distribution (lower pairwise cosine distance), and (iii) despite this proximity, ensemble disagreement (epistemic uncertainty) increases with $β$ and is exploited faster during online optimisation. We further fit a power-law curve to the $(β, \augc)$ data and identify a practical optimal conservatism level $β^{\star}$ that balances alignment fidelity against hacking vulnerability. Our results suggest that the field needs \emph{calibrated}, not \emph{maximal}, conservatism.
2606.30627.paper_summary_zh: 保守的離線訓練被廣泛倡導為後續在線適應的安全基礎：如果一個策略與良好支持的行為保持接近，這樣的論點認為，它不太可能利用學習到的獎勵模型中的不完善之處。我們在實證和機制上挑戰這一直覺。我們在直接偏好優化（DPO）下訓練了一個 Qwen3-14B 策略，並設置了三個保守程度（$β\in \{β_{\mathrm{lo}}, β_{\mathrm{mid}}, β_{\mathrm{hi}}\}$，來源於經驗對數比百分位數），然後在線適應每個檢查點，針對一個學習到的獎勵集成（3\,$\times$\,Qwen3-1.7B），同時測量在 GSM8K 精確答案準確度上的真實表現。我們發現，\emph{更高的離線保守性單調增加獎勵駭客的損害}，這是通過 Goodhart 差距及其曲線下面積（AUGC）來衡量的，在所有三個條件下 Spearman $ρ= 1.0$。機制分析揭示了一個三鏈因果鏈：（i）高-$β$ DPO 壓縮策略熵，（ii）低熵策略生成的回應具有減少的多樣性，集中在獎勵模型訓練分佈的狹窄區域（較低的成對餘弦距離），以及（iii）儘管這種接近性，集成不一致（認知不確定性）隨著 $β$ 的增加而增加，並在在線優化過程中更快地被利用。我們進一步為 $(β, \augc)$ 數據擬合了一個冪律曲線，並確定了一個實用的最佳保守性水平 $β^{\star}$，該水平在對齊忠實度和駭客脆弱性之間取得平衡。我們的結果表明，該領域需要\emph{經過校準的}，而不是\emph{最大的}保守性。
2606.30627.author: Subramanyam Sahoo et.al.
2606.30627.authors: Subramanyam Sahoo, Aman Chadha, Vinija Jain, Divya Chaudhary
